title: ajania furcata
intro: Ajania furcata, also known as Chinese chamomile or Mongolian chamomile, is a perennial herb belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and calming effects. The health benefits of Ajania furcata include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and soothing digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Ajania furcata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed for its medicinal properties or used topically for skin issues.
